meta_title: Professional B2B Partnership Registration | Vyomika Atelier LLP
meta_description: Partner with Vyomika Atelier LLP for exclusive B2B pricing, priority production and dedicated support — architects, interior designers, contractors, developers and showroom partners across India.

hero.label: Professionals
hero.title: Partner with Vyomika Atelier LLP
hero.subtitle: Bring your creative vision to life with bespoke PVD metal partitions, Corten façades, door systems and architectural metalwork — tailored for professional practice.

items.title: Architects
items.text: Large-scale architectural metalwork, façades, screens and bespoke structural features for commercial and institutional projects.

items.title: Interior Designers
items.text: High-end residential and commercial metal accents — partitions, furniture, trims and feature walls in premium PVD finishes.

items.title: Furniture Manufacturers & OEM
items.text: Components and metal sub-assemblies for luxury furniture brands and OEM production runs.

items.title: Real Estate Developers
items.text: Lobby features, common-area metalwork, entrance systems and repeat specifications across developments.

items.title: Contractors & Fit-out Agencies
items.text: Reliable supply, documented QC and on-site coordination for execution teams.

items.title: Retailers & Showroom Partners
items.text: Display partnerships, sample programmes and trade access to our PVD and metal collections.

benefits.title: Partnership Benefits
items: Marketing & sampling support — catalogs and physical samples

steps.title: Professional Registration
steps.text: Submit the application form with your practice details and areas of interest.

steps.title: Verification
steps.text: Our team reviews credentials, portfolio and business registration within 2–3 business days.

steps.title: Access & Onboarding
steps.text: Approved partners receive B2B pricing tiers, sampling options and a dedicated contact.

steps.title: Collaboration & Ordering
steps.text: Request quotes, approve drawings and place orders with priority production scheduling.

pricing.title: B2B Pricing Information
items: Tier-based pricing for volume and repeat projects
Fast quote turnaround — typically within 24–48 hours

items.title: Project-based Partner
items.text: For specific high-end one-off projects requiring custom fabrication and site coordination.

items.title: Strategic Partner
items.text: For architects, designers and developers with ongoing metalwork requirements across multiple sites.

items.title: OEM / Manufacturer Partner
items.text: Supply of metal components and finishes for furniture brands and manufacturing partners.

dealer_support.title: Dealer & Display Support
items: Display boards and physical PVD sample kits
Technical catalogs and finish specification sheets
Showroom display guidance and staff training

items.title: Quality & Craftsmanship
items.text: Delhi studio fabrication with documented QC, secure packaging and Pan-India delivery.

items.title: Innovation
items.text: CNC cutting, PVD finishes, Corten systems and bespoke engineering for complex briefs.

items.title: Reliable Timelines
items.text: Clear production schedules — typically 3–4 weeks for made-to-order metalwork after approval.

items.title: End-to-end Support
items.text: From drawing review and sampling through delivery and installation coordination.

featured_projects.title: Professional Projects
featured_projects.subtitle: A selection of collaborations with architects, designers and developers.

items.q: Is there a fee to join the professional program?
items.a: No — registration is free. Approved partners access B2B pricing and support benefits at no membership cost.
Business registration (GSTIN or equivalent), company details, and portfolio or website reference. Trade licenses may be requested for verification.
We aim to review applications within 2–3 business days and will contact you if additional information is needed.
We primarily serve projects in India. International firms specifying work in India are welcome to apply with project details.

items.q: Why might an application be declined?
items.a: Incomplete credentials, inability to verify business details, or misalignment with our product categories may result in deferral — we will explain where possible.

items.q: Is there a minimum order value?
items.a: Tier pricing applies to repeat and volume work. Single custom projects are quoted individually — there is no fixed minimum for professional accounts.
Yes — approved partners can request PVD finish sample kits and material swatches for client presentations.
Pricing tiers reflect project volume, repeat business and product category. Your relationship manager shares tier details upon approval.

items.q: Can contractors apply without a design practice?
items.a: Yes — contractors and fit-out agencies with documented project history are eligible.
We work from PDF, DWG and dimensioned drawings and can align with your project documentation workflow.
Made-to-order fabrication is typically 3–4 weeks from drawing approval, subject to complexity and studio load.

items.q: Who is my point of contact?
items.a: Each approved partner is assigned a dedicated relationship manager for quotes, production updates and sampling.

final_cta.title: Professional Account Registration
final_cta.body: Join architects, designers and contractors who specify Vyomika Atelier LLP for premium metalwork — fast quotes, dedicated support and professional discounts.
